current_focus.reason: BA-10-S4 closed the downstream supervisor action-catalog gap, the latest BA-10-S3 hardening passes already burned down the persisted chat read surfaces, object-specific override routing, live expert-guidance clarification controls, and the remaining expert-requested background-task workflow gap, so BA-10-S3 now resolves only the maintenance-automation cluster at 206 implemented / 1 partial / 5 gap scenarios; the active same-slice handoff stays with build-lead for the remaining maintenance workflow and approval-automation work rather than more chat/runtime control burn-down.
